---
doc_id: HAIOS-XXX-000          # unique, stable, never reused. HAIOS-<AREA>-<nnn>.
title: Replace with document title
revision: 0                     # integer; bump on each approved change
status: draft                   # draft → review → approved → superseded → retired
owner: "@humanaios-ui/AREA"     # CODEOWNERS group, not a person
canonical: true                 # exactly one canonical:true per doc_id across all repos
review_due: "YYYY-MM-DD"        # drives the drift monitor
retention: permanent            # permanent | 7y | 3y | superseded-only
# approved_by / approved_date   # required once status=approved (set in the approving PR)
# supersedes: HAIOS-XXX-000     # optional lineage
---

> into another repo — link to the canonical path instead (see document-registry.yaml).
